articles.title: ATOM price struggles but Cosmoverse showcases the strength of Cosmos ecosystem
articles.description: The final day of Cosmoverse in Medellin is coming to an end amid a party atmosphere in South America where few would believe a bear market was underway.

articles.title: Chainlink Is Building a Token Infrastructure for SWIFT
articles.description: Chainlink and SWIFT have announced a proof-of-concept that will allow the international bank cooperative to transfer cryptocurrencies across almost all blockchains. SWIFT could soon interact with blockchain assets.In a press release, blockchain oracle network Chainlink revealed that a collaborative proof-of-concept would allow SWIFT to instruct token transfers across nearly every blockchain...

articles.title: SWIFT To Trial Run Chainlink’s Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol
articles.description: Chainlink bulls have long touted their excitement for potential developments with SWIFT, as the two have served as long-standing (but mostly veiled) partners. SWIFT serves as one of global banking’s biggest players, and in an announcement this week, the global financial firm shared a new proof-of-concept project that will utilize a Chainlink protocol to trial […]

articles.title: Polkadot DOT Unveils New Roadmap – Here's Everything You Need to Know
articles.description: The developers of the Polkadot blockchain have released a new roadmap which paves the way for a number of major changes to its operations in the coming months. Rob Habermeier, Polkadot’s co-founder, said in a statement that Parity Technologies, the entity behind the blockchain, has developed a number of solutions designed to enhance Polkadot’s operations....
